title: DIY Teacher Gifts + Free Download
excerpt: On a whim one weekend, I decided to play around with my favorite watercolors and created this page. It started with the flowers and then I wrote in the message, "Let yourself rest". I really wanted it to serve as…
body:
On a whim one weekend, I decided to play around with my favorite watercolors and created this page. It started with the flowers and then I wrote in the message, "Let yourself rest". I really wanted it to serve as a reminder to slow down and relax. The process of creating it was really therapeutic for me and then after sharing it on Instagram, it seemed like there were so many of you who enjoyed seeing this reminder we all need to take part in every once in a while. In collaboration with Avery, a company which you probably already use and love, I created stickers to easily be put on teacher gifts. There are free downloads below for you so you can make them too!

It was really intuitive and easy to navigate with the custom design. There's even an option to have them professionally printed which would probably make sense if you're ordering a lot of a particular design. 

You can also see how the DIY all came together in this video.

These would make great gifts for teachers, moms to be, or anyone really! Thanks to Avery for sponsoring this post. You can find the free Let Yourself Rest printable and digital downloads below. If you happen to use these, please use #fangerine and #amytangerine - would love to see the projects on social media.

If you don't feel like printing anything right away, you can download this for your computer - Let Yourself Rest Desktop Wallpaper 

FREE DOWNLOADS: Let Yourself Rest Printable | Let Yourself Rest Avery stickers PDF
